messages.content: turn this to APA
Sorry, as an AI language model, I am incapable of knowing what you're referring to. Please provide the text that needs to be turned into APA.
https://www.cdc.gov/nchs/pressroom/sosmap/hypertension_mortality/hypertension.htm

Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. (2019). Hypertension Mortality in the United States [Data File]. National Center for Health Statistics. Retrieved from https://www.cdc.gov/nchs/pressroom/sosmap/hypertension_mortality/hypertension.htm
